description: Snapshot of Claude Code upstream surface area as known to the cc-settings zod schemas. Updated by hand via the /cc sync skill; bun run upstream:scan reports drift but never writes. See docs/migration-coexistence.md.
source: manual sync via the /cc sync skill (the automated upstream-sync bot was retired June 2026).
notes: knownSettingsKeys mirrors the top-level keys enumerated in src/schemas/settings.ts. Order is alphabetical so the scanner's diffs stay stable.

knownEnvVars is reference-only — bun run upstream:scan does NOT diff it. There is no local Claude-Code-itself env var source in this codebase to diff against (these are upstream CC process env vars, not application env vars set via settings.json's `env` key, which IS schema-backed). Updated by hand via the /cc sync skill when the changelog mentions a new one.

knownBuiltinTools is reference-only — bun run upstream:scan does NOT diff it. src/schemas/permissions.ts intentionally treats `Tool(pattern)` permission rules as an opaque string (schema's job is to catch typos in keys, not to enumerate every tool name), so there is no local schema enum to diff against. Refreshed 2026-07-06 with the current live tool list (previously missing Artifact, WebFetch, WebSearch, Monitor, the Task* family, SendMessage, Workflow, Enter/ExitPlanMode, Enter/ExitWorktree, LSP, AskUserQuestion, PushNotification). Updated by hand via the /cc sync skill.

knownHookTypes is diffed by bun run upstream:scan against the Hook discriminated union's `type` literals in src/schemas/hooks.ts (CommandHook/HttpHook/PromptHook/AgentHook/McpToolHook). Includes `mcp_tool` (added 2.1.118) for hooks that invoke MCP tools directly.
knownPermissionModes is diffed by bun run upstream:scan against the PermissionMode enum in src/schemas/permissions.ts (agent.ts's AgentPermissionMode re-exports the same enum).

knownMcpTransports is diffed by bun run upstream:scan against the `type` literals on McpStdioServer/McpHttpServer/McpSseServer in src/schemas/mcp.ts. Added "sse" (previously missing) — used by local desktop MCPs (e.g. Figma at http://127.0.0.1:3845/sse) that stream events instead of request/response.

knownAgentIsolation / knownAgentMemory are diffed by bun run upstream:scan against the AgentIsolation/AgentMemory enums in src/schemas/agent.ts. Widened 2026-07-06 (issue #82/#104) to include "remote" isolation and "user"/"local" memory scopes, which were real documented values previously rejected by the schema.
v2.1.139 added two hook fields (not enumerated here, see src/schemas/hooks.ts): `args: string[]` on command hooks (exec form, no shell) and `continueOnBlock: boolean` on PostToolUse hooks.
v2.1.143 added `worktree.bgIsolation: "none"` to disable background-session worktree isolation — see src/schemas/settings.ts.

v2.1.163 added two managed settings keys: requiredMinimumVersion/requiredMaximumVersion (version-range gate, distinct from the older minimumVersion). It also let Stop/SubagentStop hooks return hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext (runtime output, not a config field — see docs/hooks-reference.md).

v2.1.166 added the fallbackModel settings key (string | string[]; up to three fallback models tried in order when the primary is overloaded/unavailable) — see src/schemas/settings.ts. 2.1.167/2.1.168 were bug-fixes-only.

v2.1.169 added the disableBundledSkills settings key (hide Anthropic's bundled skills/workflows/built-in slash commands from the model) plus three env vars: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BUNDLED_SKILLS (env counterpart), CLAUDE_CODE_SAFE_MODE (counterpart of the new --safe-mode troubleshooting flag), and API_FORCE_IDLE_TIMEOUT (=0 opts out of the restored 5-min Vertex/Foundry idle-stream timeout). The rest of 2.1.169 was bug-fixes and runtime/UI tweaks (managed-MCP reconnect enforcement, /cd command, history-row navigation, perf).

v2.1.195 added the CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS env var (disable mouse click/drag/hover in fullscreen mode while keeping wheel scroll) — a CC-itself TUI toggle, manifest-tracked only. It also fixed hook matchers with hyphenated identifiers (e.g. code-reviewer, mcp__brave-search) accidentally substring-matching — they now exact-match; use a `__.*` suffix to match all tools from a hyphenated MCP server. Verified-safe for cc-settings: every hook matcher in config/40-hooks.json is a non-hyphenated builtin tool name (Bash, Edit, Write|Edit, Edit|Write|MultiEdit). v2.1.194 shipped with no changelog entries (skipped). The rest of 2.1.195 was voice-dictation, plugin-loader, and background-task/remote-session bug fixes with no config surface.

v2.1.203/2.1.204 were bug-fixes-only (background-agent/daemon reliability, TUI polish, headless SessionStart hook streaming) — no new config surface. The 2.1.203 notes surfaced CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE (full mouse-capture opt-out, companion to CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_MOUSE_CLICKS), which we had never tracked; added to knownEnvVars. Also added advisorModel to knownSettingsKeys — it entered src/schemas/settings.ts in PR #126 (upstream 2.1.98) but the manifest was never updated, so the scanner flagged it every run.
